expectedVersion.description: Optional optimistic-concurrency check. When set, the host validates the canvas's current version equals this value before applying the mutation. Mismatch returns `canvas_version_conflict`. Omit for unconditional write.

merge.description: How the mutation merges with existing state. `replace` overwrites the entire state. `shallow` merges top-level keys (later wins). `deep` recursively merges objects.
